headline: CB&I Recognized with Four 2025 STI/SPFA Tank of the Year Awards
summary: The Steel Tank Institute/Steel Plate Fabricators Association (STI/SPFA) presented CB&I with four field-erected Tank of the Year awards during its recent annual meeting held in Clearwater Beach, FL. STI/SPFA is a non-profit trade association whose member companies fabricate steel tanks, pipe, and pressure vessels for use across various industries.
